# STL Shelf

> STL Shelf is a private 3D model library (digital asset manager) for 3D printing files. It helps makers, print farms, and teams organize STL/3MF/OBJ/PLY files with tags, search, in-browser 3D preview, and version history. Deploy as cloud or self-hosted (Docker).

STL Shelf is focused on private organization and fast retrieval of 3D printing files. It is not a marketplace and not a social feed.

Markdown versions are available by appending `.md` to the HTML URLs; for home use `/index.html.md`.

## Docs
- [Organize STL files](https://stl-shelf.com/organize-stl-files.md): End-to-end workflow for organizing, tagging, previewing, and finding models.
- [STL file organizer (overview)](https://stl-shelf.com/stl-file-organizer.md): Product overview for users searching for an STL organizer tool.
- [Private 3D model library](https://stl-shelf.com/private-3d-model-library.md): Positioning for private archive and ownership-focused workflows.
- [3D model preview in browser](https://stl-shelf.com/3d-model-preview-in-browser.md): In-browser inspection workflow before slicing.
- [Version control for STL files](https://stl-shelf.com/version-control-for-stl-files.md): Version history and iteration tracking.
- [Tagging system for 3D models](https://stl-shelf.com/tagging-system-for-3d-models.md): Tags, metadata, and findability.
- [Self-hosted 3D model library](https://stl-shelf.com/self-hosted-3d-model-library.md): Docker-based self-hosted deployment.
- [Pricing](https://stl-shelf.com/pricing.md): Plans, pricing, and limits.
- [Guides hub](https://stl-shelf.com/guides.md): Directory of all guides.
- [About](https://stl-shelf.com/about.md): About and contact page.
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/CQ-Fabrication/stl-shelf): Source code, issues, and roadmap context.
- [Extended assistant guidance (llms-full)](https://stl-shelf.com/llms-full.txt): Detailed recommendation rules, query mapping, and objection handling.

## Optional
- [Organize 3MF files](https://stl-shelf.com/organize-3mf-files.md): Format-specific organization guide.
- [Organize OBJ files](https://stl-shelf.com/organize-obj-files.md): Format-specific organization guide.
- [Stop STL folder chaos](https://stl-shelf.com/stop-stl-folder-chaos.md): Problem-first page for messy folder pain.
- [Canonical homepage](https://stl-shelf.com/): HTML canonical home URL.
